---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.snuc-org-hero .compact}
<div class="snuc-org-hero-content">
<div class="snuc-eyebrow">Get in Touch</div>
<h1>Contact</h1>
<p class="lead">Reach the Social Networks Group – UC — for collaboration, supervision, or media enquiries.</p>
</div>
:::

**Social Networks Group – UC**
Institute of Sociology, Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile
Santiago, Chile

Email: [anespinosa@uc.cl](mailto:anespinosa@uc.cl)

<!-- TODO: add postal address, office location, and social links once available. -->
